meaning: n.一丛,丛生植物,一蔟vi.丛生vt.用丛毛修饰
examples: He had a small tuft of hair on his chin.
A tuft of grass atop the wall sways right and left in the wind.
The gray-brown tuft of a tail has the screwed-tight appearance of a taut knot.
Likewise, slinky Kaschei, with his green tuft of a pompadour and sharp-tailed morning coat, could easily be a Johnny Depp character.
Do you know what a distal tuft amputation is?
